summary: The 'Run prettier' CI job failed because two files in the repository were not formatted with prettier. The prettier-check script detected unformatted code and exited with code 1.
root_cause: Two files were not formatted with prettier: 'packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js' and 'compiler/packages/babel-plugin-react-compiler/src/ReactiveScopes/CodegenReactiveFunction.ts'. The prettier-check script detected the formatting issues and failed.

evidence.quote:
This project uses prettier to format all JavaScript code.
     Please run yarn prettier-all and add changes to files listed below to your commit:
evidence.reason: The prettier-check script explicitly states that the listed files need to be formatted and committed.
This file was identified as needing prettier formatting.
This file was identified as needing prettier formatting.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: The prettier-check command exited with code 1, indicating the formatting check failed.

suggested_fix: Run 'yarn prettier-all' locally, then add the formatted changes for 'packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js' and 'compiler/packages/babel-plugin-react-compiler/src/ReactiveScopes/CodegenReactiveFunction.ts' to the commit.
